name: Argus
description: Argus is an automated legal intelligence platform that conducts forensic-grade due diligence across 10 OSINT blocks including Indian courts, regulatory bodies, and global registries. The platform delivers verifiable results grounded in real web evidence in under 90 seconds.
target_users: Investment firms and law firms requiring rapid, automated, and verifiable legal due diligence for pre-investment and litigation purposes, particularly those operating within or dealing with Indian legal and regulatory frameworks.
problem_solved: Traditional background checks and due diligence are slow, manual, and often lack depth or verification against real-time legal and regulatory databases.

name: BAAB (باب)
description: BAAB is Muscat's premium property asset and community management firm, offering a unified platform for physically verified listings and AI-driven searches. The platform combines technical innovation with community-focused management to bridge the gap between property ownership and resident belonging.
target_users: Property owners and real estate agencies in Oman seeking a trustworthy and efficient platform for listing and managing properties, while renters and buyers are looking for verified listings and AI-powered search capabilities.
problem_solved: The Omani real estate market suffers from unverified listings, duplicate property entries, and inflated pricing, creating a lack of trust for renters and buyers.

name: bh.ai
description: bh.ai is an interactive digital archive that leverages a collection of over 120 legendary tweets from Salman Khan's golden era (2010-2016). The platform uses AI to match user queries with iconic celebrity wisdom, allowing fans to generate viral social media cards and translate text into signature 'Bhai' style.
target_users: Fans of Indian pop culture and Salman Khan, particularly active on social media, seeking to engage with and share iconic celebrity moments and 'wisdom' in a fun, personalized format.
problem_solved: Fans of Indian pop culture often struggle to find and share specific iconic celebrity moments or 'wisdom' in a high-quality, shareable format.

name: BLAZE
description: BLAZE is an AI-powered marketing platform specifically designed for Indian D2C brands to automate content creation. By converting simple product photos into platform-optimized campaigns, it enables brands to scale their presence across Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp instantly.
target_users: Small to medium-sized Indian Direct-to-Consumer (D2C) e-commerce businesses seeking to efficiently generate and distribute AI-powered marketing campaigns across social media and messaging platforms.
problem_solved: D2C brands often struggle with the manual effort, high costs, and time required to create high-quality, platform-specific marketing content and captions.

name: Bold World Engineering
description: BWE Studio is an AI-powered venture lab that builds vertical SaaS operating systems by prioritizing rapid execution over traditional pitching. They leverage a proprietary validation framework to ship MVPs in 90 days, focusing on de-risking the zero-to-one phase for builders and investors alike.
target_users: Agile investors and forward-thinking founders seeking to rapidly validate and launch AI-powered vertical SaaS solutions, reducing early-stage risk and accelerating market entry.
problem_solved: Traditional venture capital moves slowly and often funds ideas based on polished pitch decks rather than proven utility, leading to a high failure rate for startups solving non-existent problems.

name: BREAKER
description: Breaker is a gamified community testing platform that transforms traditional quality assurance into a competitive arena. It allows developers and testers to earn cash bounties, status, and 'glory' by identifying and crushing bugs in live software targets.
target_users: Software development companies and product managers who are looking to improve their QA processes by leveraging a large, incentivized community of testers to identify bugs more efficiently.
problem_solved: Traditional software testing is often tedious for developers and lacks the scale needed to catch critical bugs before release.

name: Brivo
description: Brivo is an India-based legal marketplace that connects individuals with verified lawyers through an AI-enhanced platform. It streamlines the legal process by providing AI-powered case briefs, transparent pricing models, and secure private rooms for document sharing and communication.
target_users: Individuals and small to medium businesses in India seeking efficient, transparent, and AI-augmented access to verified legal professionals for simplified case discovery and management.
problem_solved: The traditional legal system in India is often opaque, lacks pricing transparency, and makes it difficult for clients to find the right specialized advocate quickly.

name: CARMA
description: CARMA is an AI-powered vehicle management platform designed specifically for the Indian market to optimize car ownership costs. The app acts as an intelligent garage companion that tracks expenses, logs fuel efficiency, and provides AI-driven maintenance diagnostics and price benchmarking.
target_users: Indian car owners seeking to reduce ownership costs through proactive management and AI-driven insights.
problem_solved: The average Indian car owner loses approximately ₹47,000 annually due to invisible costs such as overcharged service fees, poor fuel efficiency, and avoidable fines.

name: CARTA
description: CARTA OS is an all-in-one operating layer for restaurants and caterers that unifies fragmented workflows. The platform centralizes digital QR menus, professional proposal builders, and operational analytics into a single data layer enhanced by specialized AI agents.
target_users: Restaurants and caterers in India seeking a unified software solution to streamline digital menus, sales proposals, and operational analytics.
problem_solved: Food businesses often struggle with fragmented tools, stitching together separate QR menu apps, CRMs, proposal builders, and manual analytics dashboards.

name: Closr
description: Closr is an AI-powered sales platform designed specifically for multi-product founders and agencies to automate their entire sales funnel. It manages everything from omnichannel lead engagement to payment collection, allowing builders to scale revenue across multiple projects without hiring dedicated sales teams.
target_users: Multi-product founders and agencies looking to automate their sales funnel and scale revenue across multiple offerings without the expense of hiring dedicated sales teams.
problem_solved: Founders with multiple products often become the bottleneck in their own sales process, leading to decayed leads and missed revenue because hiring dedicated SDRs for every product is prohibitively expensive.

name: Dypos
description: Dypos is a universal privacy operating system designed to automate DPDP compliance for Indian enterprises. It provides a unified infrastructure layer that manages consent, logs, and breach workflows across digital and physical touchpoints like web, mobile, CCTV, and biometrics.
target_users: Indian enterprises of all sizes struggling with the complexities and manual burden of complying with the DPDP Act across their diverse digital and physical data touchpoints.
problem_solved: Indian enterprises face fragmented data flows across digital and physical channels, making it nearly impossible to maintain manual compliance with the Digital Personal Data Protection (DPDP) Act.

name: FLAER
description: FLAER is an autonomous trading intelligence platform specifically designed for the Indian equity market. It combines machine learning for signal generation with rigorous risk management protocols to help traders execute disciplined strategies across momentum, mean reversion, and breakouts.
target_users: Indian retail traders actively participating in the equity market who struggle with emotional trading and risk management, seeking an automated solution to improve their discipline and capital preservation.
problem_solved: Most retail traders lose money due to emotional decision-making, overtrading, and a lack of disciplined risk management.

name: Haqiq / حقيقة
description: Haqiq is a live-web verification platform designed specifically for the Arab world, providing instant fact-checking of claims, links, and media. The tool cross-references real-time data from newsrooms and government wires across 22 Arab states to deliver verdicts with cited evidence.
target_users: Journalists, news organizations, and fact-checking initiatives operating within or focused on the Arab world who require rapid, reliable, and evidence-based verification of real-time information, claims, and media.
problem_solved: Rumors and misinformation spread rapidly across the Middle East, often outpacing the ability of newsrooms and professionals to verify them using static AI tools or manual searches.

name: HAVEN
description: HAVEN is a specialized co-living operator providing premium, tech-enabled housing tailored specifically for medical students. The platform combines hardware such as ergonomic workstations and clinical-grade cleaning with a proprietary AI-powered operating system to automate property management.
target_users: Co-living operators targeting niche professional student markets who require automated property management and enhanced resident experience.
problem_solved: Medical students often face distracting living environments, poor maintenance, and administrative friction in traditional student housing which can hinder their academic performance.

name: HIROS
description: HIROS is an autonomous HR platform that deploys a squad of five specialized AI agents to manage end-to-end human resources operations. The platform automates everything from onboarding and performance tracking to compensation intelligence and India-specific compliance protocols.
target_users: Mid-to-large sized businesses in India experiencing significant HR administrative overhead and looking to automate their HR operations for increased efficiency and compliance.
problem_solved: HR departments are often overwhelmed by manual administrative tasks, compliance bottlenecks, and chaotic onboarding processes that distract from strategic growth.

name: JetPlannr
description: JetPlannr is an AI-powered event planning assistant that transforms the traditional weeks-long organization process into a matter of minutes. By gathering user preferences through interactive prompts, it generates comprehensive timelines, budget breakdowns, and invitations that can be exported across multiple platforms.
target_users: Event planners, marketing professionals, or individuals organizing personal events who need to streamline the planning process and save significant time and effort.
problem_solved: Traditional event planning is a time-consuming, fragmented process that often takes weeks of manual coordination and budgeting.

name: Krew
description: Krew is the social nightlife OS. Coordinate groups, lock commitment with deposits, auto-split bills, and let AI pick the perfect venue. Free forever.
target_users: Young adults and social groups aged 18-35 who frequently plan group outings for nightlife and entertainment, struggling with coordination, payment splitting, and venue selection.
problem_solved: Planning group nightlife activities is plagued by issues like the 'who pays?' problem (someone fronts large amounts, leading to cash flow burden and messy splitting), the 'where?' problem (decision paralysis through lengthy group chats), the 'no-show' problem (low attendance despite commitments, leading to wasted money), and 'settlement hell' (multiple transactions, IOUs, and potential friendship tension over money).

name: KYROS
description: KYROS is a neural optimization platform that utilizes precise binaural audio frequencies to guide users into specific cognitive states such as focus, flow, and rest. The platform integrates optional HRV biometric tracking and a voice-enabled AI assistant to provide real-time feedback and personalized protocol recommendations.
target_users: Professionals and creatives aged 25-55 experiencing cognitive overload and seeking to optimize their mental performance, focus, and relaxation through data-driven biofeedback and AI-guided interventions.
problem_solved: Individuals often struggle to manually shift their mental state, leading to issues with productivity, stress management, and sleep quality.

name: MANIFEST
description: MANIFEST is an agentic operating system designed to provide complete sovereignty over global trade logistics. It unifies fragmented data into a single command center for real-time tracking, automated compliance, and AI-driven risk management across over 50 global ports.
target_users: Global trade enterprises struggling with fragmented logistics data, manual processes, and a lack of real-time visibility who are seeking to automate compliance, enhance tracking, and proactively manage supply chain risks through an AI-powered operating system.
problem_solved: Global trade is plagued by manual processes, siloed data across multiple platforms, and poor visibility, leading to frequent delays and data loss.

name: Memo
description: Memo is a weekly KPI platform designed to help founders track critical metrics and generate board-ready updates with minimal effort. It simplifies the reporting process by allowing users to submit data via voice or text through WhatsApp, converting inputs into structured weekly summaries.
target_users: Early-stage to growth-stage B2B SaaS founders of companies with 5-50 employees who need to efficiently track and report on key performance indicators to stakeholders.
problem_solved: Founders often waste hours manually collecting metrics from various sources, leading to a "Sunday night scramble" before board meetings and a lack of clarity on business health.

name: MindYard
description: MindYard is an AI-powered creative therapy platform that transforms emotional states into personalized art, sound journeys, and journaling sessions. Designed for neurodivergent and creative individuals, it provides a sensory-safe digital space for private emotional processing and mood tracking.
target_users: Neurodivergent and creative individuals seeking alternative, sensory-safe methods for emotional processing and mood management.
problem_solved: Traditional talk therapy can be overwhelming or inaccessible for introverts and neurodivergent individuals who struggle to articulate complex emotions through words alone.

name: ORBIT
description: ORBIT is an autonomous compliance operating system designed to handle GST, TDS, and ROC filings for Indian SMBs. The platform automates data ingestion and tax computation while providing direct portal filing and a verified marketplace of Chartered Accountants.
target_users: Indian Small and Medium-sized Businesses (SMBs) struggling with manual, error-prone, and time-consuming GST, TDS, and ROC compliance, leading to potential penalties and audit risks.
problem_solved: Indian SMBs face heavy penalties and audit risks due to manual tracking, calculation errors, and missed tax deadlines across fragmented communication channels like WhatsApp and email.

name: Platos
description: Platos is an AI-powered restaurant management platform that automates marketing, menu digitization, and brand identity creation through natural conversation. Designed specifically for the Indian market, it serves as an 'always-on' marketing department that allows owners to approve automated campaigns and menu updates via a centralized dashboard.
target_users: The ideal customer is an independent restaurant owner in India who is overwhelmed by the administrative and marketing demands of running their business, leading to time away from core culinary operations.
problem_solved: Restaurant owners often face operational exhaustion, spending late hours on manual tasks like menu updates, graphic design, and marketing instead of focusing on their kitchen.

name: PLENTY
description: PLENTY is an AI-powered supply chain operating system specifically designed for the Indian restaurant industry. The platform automates inventory management, procurement, and waste tracking through a mobile-first interface featuring voice commands and gesture-based decision making.
target_users: Small to medium-sized restaurant owners in India who are seeking to streamline their supply chain management and reduce waste through an AI-powered, voice-first operating system.
problem_solved: Restaurant owners in India struggle with manual stock tracking, wasteful procurement cycles, and the constant juggling of multiple suppliers and invoices.

name: PR13
description: PR13 is an AI-powered reputation insurance platform designed for high-profile individuals such as founders, celebrities, and politicians. The platform provides 24/7 monitoring across social media and news outlets, delivering instant threat detection and AI-generated crisis response playbooks.
target_users: High-profile individuals like founders, celebrities, and politicians who require proactive, AI-driven protection against reputation-damaging online threats and rapid crisis response.
problem_solved: Public figures often discover reputation-damaging narratives only after they have gone viral, leaving them trailing behind a crisis with no immediate plan of action.

name: Praise
description: Praise is an AI-powered content engine that converts raw client feedback into a multi-platform marketing suite. It automatically generates six different content formats, including LinkedIn posts, carousels, and case studies, from a single testimonial in under 60 seconds.
target_users: Marketing managers at B2B SaaS companies responsible for social media content creation and customer advocacy who are seeking efficient ways to leverage client testimonials.
problem_solved: Valuable client testimonials and reviews often sit dormant in folders or emails, acting as wasted assets because companies lack the time or tools to repurpose them into consistent social content.

name: Prysm
description: Prysm is an AI-powered operating system designed specifically for venture capital firms to automate deal sourcing and portfolio management. The platform synthesizes real-time market signals—ranging from executive moves to hiring patterns—into actionable intelligence and automated workflows.
target_users: Venture capital firms of all sizes seeking to leverage AI for improved deal sourcing, portfolio management, and data-driven investment decisions.
problem_solved: Venture capitalists often miss critical market signals and investment opportunities due to the manual effort required to monitor fragmented data across global markets.

name: Regos
description: Regos is an automated regulatory operating system designed specifically for the Indian market, monitoring over 30 regulators across 8 industry verticals. It utilizes AI to translate complex government notifications, circulars, and gazettes into actionable tasks and board-ready documentation for businesses.
target_users: Indian businesses, particularly those operating in regulated sectors, seeking to automate their compliance monitoring and reduce the risk of non-compliance through AI-powered insights and actionable documentation.
problem_solved: Indian businesses struggle to keep up with the high volume of rapid changes across multiple regulators, often leading to non-compliance risks and manual, error-prone monitoring.

name: REOS
description: REOS is an all-in-one AI marketing platform designed specifically for the Indian real estate market, enabling professionals to generate high-quality collateral from a single listing input. The system automates the production of RERA-compliant brochures, social media posters, video reels, and mobile-optimized microsites with integrated lead tracking.
target_users: Indian real estate agents and developers seeking to automate marketing collateral creation and enhance lead generation through AI-powered tools.
problem_solved: Real estate professionals spend excessive hours manually creating marketing materials like brochures, posters, and videos for every new listing.

name: Ritual
description: Ritual is an operations platform that transforms static SOPs into a mobile-first, gesture-based workflow. It leverages an AI co-pilot to automate task scheduling and SOP generation, turning complex operational management into a series of simple swipes.
target_users: Operations managers and team leads in industries with high rates of task execution and manual processes, such as retail, hospitality, and field services, struggling with SOP adherence and workflow efficiency.
problem_solved: Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) often get lost in documents, lead to accountability gaps, and create manual overhead for managers who must constantly follow up on task completion.

name: RIVAL
description: RIVAL is an autonomous competitive intelligence platform that acts as an operating system for market warfare. Using AI agent swarms, it monitors over 10,000 sources to provide real-time signals, competitor DNA modeling, and predictive move analysis.
target_users: Enterprise-level companies in highly competitive markets, such as technology, retail, and financial services, who require real-time competitive intelligence and automated strategic response capabilities.
problem_solved: Companies often lose market share because they react too slowly to competitor moves due to manual, fragmented, and delayed intelligence gathering.

name: Sahi
description: Sahi is a real estate property verification platform powered by the Manus action engine. It streamlines the due diligence process for home buyers by providing automated verification and documentation tools.
target_users: Real estate developers, legal firms, and financial institutions seeking to streamline and enhance the accuracy of their property verification processes.
problem_solved: The real estate market often lacks transparency and speed when it comes to verifying property details and legal standing, leading to risks for buyers.

name: SCOUT
description: SCOUT is an AI-powered forensic fraud detection platform designed to verify influencer authenticity. It analyzes follower quality, engagement patterns, and growth velocity to protect marketing budgets from bot accounts and artificial boosting.
target_users: Marketing departments within mid-to-large sized companies that engage in influencer marketing campaigns and are seeking to protect their advertising budgets from fraudulent activity.
problem_solved: Brands lose billions annually to influencer fraud, including fake followers, engagement pods, and artificial activity that drains marketing budgets.

name: Sentinel
description: Sentinel is a high-precision financial reconciliation platform designed for Indian enterprises to prevent revenue leakage. It provides continuous surveillance and real-time interception of duplicate invoices, vendor overcharges, and identity mismatches.
target_users: Mid-to-large Indian enterprises in sectors with high transaction volumes and complex vendor relationships seeking to significantly reduce financial leakage through automated reconciliation.
problem_solved: Enterprises lose millions annually due to duplicate payments, timing anomalies, and vendor overcharges that manual accounting and spreadsheets fail to detect.

name: Setu
description: Setu is India's first legal translation engine specifically designed for High Courts and District Courts. The platform utilizes the proprietary NyayaSetu protocol to transform plaints, petitions, and judgments between English and Hindi with 100% statutory adherence.
target_users: Indian law firms, legal departments within corporations, and government legal bodies operating in India that require accurate and statutory compliant translation of legal documents between English and Hindi for court proceedings.
problem_solved: India's legal system faces significant language barriers, where complex legal terminology in English often prevents accessibility and compliance in local court proceedings.

name: SharkFund
description: SharkFund is a deal intelligence platform that provides startup founders with data-backed insights based on every pitch from Shark Tank India. It offers a proprietary VALI-360 scoring system to help entrepreneurs predict counter-offers, find investor matches, and refine their negotiation strategies.
target_users: Startup founders in India seeking data-driven insights and negotiation support for their fundraising pitches on Shark Tank India.
problem_solved: Founders often enter high-stakes fundraising pitches without understanding their true market value or how specific investors will perceive their unit economics.

name: SIGNAL
description: Every story scored. Every claim traced. SIGNAL is the world's first AI-powered news verification platform. Real-time fact-checking across 4,200+ sources in 140 countries.
target_users: Media organizations, investigative journalists, and fact-checking agencies seeking to rapidly and reliably verify the accuracy of news content at scale.
problem_solved: A high percentage (87%) of viral stories contain unverified claims, indicating a significant verification problem in the news landscape.

name: Strata
description: Strata is an AI-native database platform that automatically structures raw data into organized tables and workflows. It serves as a modern, intelligent alternative to traditional tools like Airtable by automating schema detection and repetitive manual entry.
target_users: Small to medium-sized businesses struggling with data organization and workflow automation for their cross-functional teams who need a no-code, AI-powered solution.
problem_solved: Teams struggle with messy, unstructured data and the time-consuming manual effort required to map CSVs, build automations, and maintain database hygiene.

name: Suite
description: Suite provides an on-demand virtual C-Suite including a CMO, CFO, and CHRO designed to support startup founders. The platform goes beyond simple chat by generating tangible business artifacts such as financial models, go-to-market playbooks, and hiring plans.
target_users: Early-stage startup founders who require expert strategic and operational guidance in marketing, finance, and HR but lack the capital to hire full-time, high-level executives.
problem_solved: Founders often lack the budget for high-level executives, leading to decision fatigue, stalled progress, and administrative bottlenecks when trying to handle marketing, finance, and HR alone.

name: SUTRA
description: SUTRA is an AI-powered networking intelligence platform designed to transform business cards and brief encounters into long-term professional relationships. It leverages optical character recognition, voice-to-text memos, and automated intelligence briefs to ensure no connection is lost in the critical 72-hour window after a meeting.
target_users: Sales professionals and business developers in fast-paced industries who regularly attend networking events and struggle to efficiently manage and nurture new professional connections.
problem_solved: Most business relationships die within 72 hours of the initial meeting because people fail to follow up effectively, leading to lost opportunities and unrealized professional value.

name: The Best App Store
description: BWE Studio is a curated portfolio of 33 production-grade applications built without outside capital across sectors like Wealth, Health, and Systems. The studio focuses on maintaining high-quality, independently conceived ventures that solve real-world problems for families and businesses.
target_users: Established businesses and discerning individuals seeking reliable, high-quality, and privacy-focused software solutions that have been developed with a strong emphasis on engineering excellence and immediate utility, avoiding the potential misalignments of VC-funded ventures.
problem_solved: Many software solutions are over-funded, bloated, or fail to address granular needs across diverse sectors like Indian tax compliance, chronic care management, and freelance invoicing.

name: VaniOS
description: VaniOS is an ambient AI medical scribe specifically engineered for the Indian healthcare ecosystem, capable of transcribing multilingual consultations to generate SOAP notes and prescriptions in seconds. The platform automates administrative backlogs like insurance claims and patient follow-ups, allowing doctors to focus entirely on patient care.
target_users: Mid-to-large private healthcare clinics and hospitals in India utilizing a physician-led model, experiencing significant administrative overhead due to multilingual patient consultations.
problem_solved: Doctors in India face a massive administrative burden, often spending late hours manually writing prescriptions, SOAP notes, and insurance claims while managing patients who frequently switch between multiple languages during consultations.

name: WaBOS
description: WaBOS is an AI-powered WhatsApp Business Operating System that transforms a single WhatsApp number into a 24/7 business hub. It utilizes 8 specialized AI agents to automate sales, bookings, support, and customer retention for local businesses and service providers.
target_users: Small to medium-sized local businesses and service providers struggling with timely customer communication and inefficient manual sales, booking, and support processes on WhatsApp.
problem_solved: Small businesses lose revenue due to delayed responses to customer inquiries, the high cost of manual staffing for messaging, and the inability to handle high-volume queries 24/7.

name: Wild Minds
description: Wild Minds is a creative platform designed for children ages 6-14 that transforms their ideas into fully illustrated, 8-page digital storybooks. By leveraging guided prompts across six creative territories, the platform empowers young minds to become authors and see their imagination come to life through AI-driven storytelling.
target_users: Parents or guardians of children aged 6-14 seeking engaging, creative educational tools that foster imagination, storytelling, and literacy skills through AI-powered personalized content creation.
problem_solved: Children often have vast imaginations but lack the technical writing or artistic skills to structure and visualize their ideas into complete, professional-looking stories.
technologies_mentioned: AI Image Generation (Stable Diffusion or similar)

name: Vidhi
description: Vidhi is a comprehensive AI-powered legal operating system designed specifically for Indian litigators. It integrates case management, eCourts synchronization, legal drafting, and research tools into a single platform to streamline chamber operations.
target_users: Indian litigators who are seeking to automate case management, streamline legal drafting, and improve research efficiency through an AI-powered, integrated platform.
problem_solved: Indian lawyers often struggle with manual case tracking, missing critical court dates, and inefficient document drafting processes using generic tools.

name: Muse
description: Muse is an intelligent wedding planning platform that combines cultural intelligence with modern project management tools. It provides couples with AI-driven timelines, family collaboration dashboards, and secure escrow vendor payments across 40+ regional Indian traditions.
target_users: Engaged couples planning a large, culturally diverse Indian wedding who are seeking a streamlined, transparent, and collaborative platform to manage complex logistics, vendor relationships, and family input.
problem_solved: Planning Indian weddings is often a chaotic process plagued by fragmented communication, Budget overruns, vendor trust issues, and the complexity of managing diverse cultural rituals.

name: Beat
description: Beat is a comprehensive heart and metabolic health monitoring platform designed specifically for Indian families. It enables remote tracking of vital signs like blood pressure and blood sugar, facilitating a seamless connection between aging parents and their children across different cities.
target_users: Indian adult children concerned about the remote health and metabolic well-being of their aging parents.
problem_solved: Indian families living apart struggle to monitor the health of aging parents, leading to anxiety, inconsistent vital tracking, and missed medical insights.

name: LGCY
description: LGCY is a comprehensive digital estate planning platform specifically designed for Indian families to manage succession and wealth transfer. The platform enables users to centralize asset registries, verify nominees across all holdings, and generate legally compliant wills through an AI-guided interface.
target_users: Indian families seeking to proactively manage and secure their financial legacy through organized estate planning and digital will creation.
problem_solved: India has over ₹3.2 lakh crore in unclaimed assets due to poor nomination records, scattered financial data, and the lack of formal legal wills, often leaving families in years of legal limbo.

name: Kosh
description: KOSH is a mobile-first daily closing app designed specifically for Indian micro-businesses like kirana stores, cafes, and salons. It simplifies financial record-keeping by allowing owners to track sales, expenses, and cash reconciliation in just 60 seconds a day.
target_users: Micro-business owners in India, such as kirana store operators, cafe owners, and salon proprietors, who lack formal bookkeeping systems and seek a quick, mobile-first solution to track daily finances and improve access to credit.
problem_solved: Small business owners often struggle with manual bookkeeping, leading to uncertainty about daily profits and lack of formal records for bank loans.

name: Pact
description: PACT is a high-stakes fitness accountability platform that uses financial consequences and social pressure to build discipline. Users stake real money on their weekly habits, which is either saved in a 'Victory Vault' upon success or forfeited if they fail to meet their commitments.
target_users: Individuals motivated by financial incentives and social accountability who are looking for a more robust and effective way to build and maintain healthy habits, particularly fitness commitments.
problem_solved: Traditional habit trackers lack real consequences, leading to a cycle of broken commitments and lost motivation when there is no penalty for quitting.

name: Kuro
description: KURO is an autonomous AI fitness agent that enables frictionless tracking through voice commands and photo analysis. It provides proactive nutritional alerts, personalized training protocols, and memory-based logging to help athletes maintain high-performance streaks.
target_users: High-performance athletes and fitness enthusiasts who seek to optimize their training and nutrition through seamless, AI-powered tracking and personalized guidance.
problem_solved: Manual fitness tracking is high-friction, leading to inconsistent logging, missed protein targets, and broken streaks.

name: RoastMyCV
description: RoastMyCV is a cheeky AI-powered tool that provides instant, brutally honest feedback on resumes. Users can upload their CVs to receive an employability score and a humorous yet critical breakdown of their professional documents without requiring a signup.
target_users: Job seekers who need fast, direct, and actionable feedback on their resumes to improve their chances of getting hired.
problem_solved: Job seekers often receive generic feedback or total silence from recruiters, leaving them unaware of obvious red flags or formatting errors in their resumes.

name: PayReady
description: PayReady is an AI-powered vendor onboarding platform designed specifically for the Indian market to streamline compliance and payment readiness. The platform automates the collection and verification of essential documents like GST certificates, PAN cards, and cancelled cheques using intelligent data extraction.
target_users: Mid-to-large enterprises in India struggling with manual, inefficient, and high-risk vendor onboarding processes, seeking to automate compliance and accelerate vendor payment readiness.
problem_solved: Finance teams in India face manual, time-consuming vendor onboarding processes involving endless follow-ups, delayed payments, and high compliance risks due to manual verification errors.

name: Council
description: Council is a multi-model reasoning engine that orchestrates leading AI models like GPT, Gemini, and Claude to collaborate on complex decision-making. Through a structured process of adversarial review and peer synthesis, it eliminates individual model hallucinations to provide high-confidence, vetted answers.
target_users: Knowledge-intensive businesses and enterprise teams requiring high-accuracy, reliable, and validated AI-generated insights for critical decision-making.
problem_solved: Single-model AI outputs often suffer from hallucinations, inherent biases, and blind spots that make them unreliable for critical business decisions.

name: Solo
description: SOLO is an all-in-one financial operating system designed specifically for freelancers and solopreneurs to manage invoicing, taxes, and financial planning. The platform features an AI-powered CFO advisor that provides real-time insights on rate adjustments, hiring decisions, and cash flow management.
target_users: AI-powered financial platform for solopreneurs and freelancers needing automated invoicing, tax management, and AI-driven financial guidance.
problem_solved: Solopreneurs struggle with fragmented financial tools, slow invoice payments, and the lack of professional financial guidance, often leading to manual admin overhead and tax-season panic.

name: Aura
description: AURA is an AI-powered styling engine that digitizes a user's physical wardrobe to provide instant, personalized outfit recommendations. By integrating context like weather, calendar events, and mood, it acts as a digital architect for personal style.
target_users: Fashion-conscious individuals who value efficiency and personalized style, and own a significant wardrobe they struggle to utilize effectively.
problem_solved: Most people only wear 20% of their wardrobe and waste time every morning deciding what to wear despite having thousands of dollars worth of clothes.
